/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/audio_ingestor.dir/src/media/audio_ingestor/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/audio_ingestor.dir/src/media/audio_ingestor/audio_pipeline.cpp.o -o audio_ingestor  -lzmq -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.8.1 -lflatbuffers -lpthread /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.7.1.3 -Wl,--as-needed
